title: Tameable Enderman
description: This Data Pack Let's You Tame Enderman's With A Magic Ender Pearl.
body:
- This Data Pack Let's You Tame Enderman's With A Magic Ender Pearl.
- To Get A Magic Ender Pearl Throw One Ender Pearl And One Nether Star On The Ground Together.

To Untame A Enderman Throw One Ender Eye On Them.

Taming a enderman will let them bring you stuff when you sneak next to them, selecting different slots will let the enderman bring you different things.

**in the 6th slot they will bring you cobblestone, in the 7th slot they will bring you wood, in the 8th slot they will bring you food, in the 9th slot they will bring you ores.**
